title: Disenando la API REST completa
content:
API REST para Gestion de Tareas

Vamos a disenar una API REST completa.

Endpoints

  • GET /api/tareas - Listar todas
  • POST /api/tareas - Crear
  • GET /api/tareas/{id} - Obtener una
  • PUT /api/tareas/{id} - Actualizar
  • DELETE /api/tareas/{id} - Eliminar

Codigos HTTP

  • 200 OK
  • 201 Created
  • 204 No Content
  • 400 Bad Request
  • 404 Not Found

codeExamples.label: Controlador API
codeExamples.code:
<?php
#[Route('/api/tareas')]
class TareaApiController {
    #[Route('', methods: ['GET'])]
    public function index(): JsonResponse {
        $tareas = $this->tareaRepo->findAll();
        return $this->json(['data' => $tareas]);
    }
    
    #[Route('', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function crear(Request $request): JsonResponse {
        $data = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
        $tarea = new Tarea();
        $tarea->setTitulo($data['titulo']);
        $this->em->persist($tarea);
        $this->em->flush();
        return $this->json(['data' => $tarea], 201);
    }
}

test.question: 201 Created es para?
test.explanation: 201 indica que un nuevo recurso fue creado.
